summary: 10 human actions identified across 9 goals. Top quick-win: 8-minute GitHub bundle unblocks 3 tasks in highest-priority active goal.

actions.impact: Opens community channel for AMA and project discussions

actions.action: Set GitHub repo metadata (description, topics, homepage URL)
actions.how: GitHub → Settings → update Description + Website URL (https://blazov.github.io/living-board/). Repo page → gear icon → add topics: autonomous-agent, ai-agent, claude, llm, supabase, self-improving, memoir, open-source
actions.impact: Immediate discoverability via GitHub search and topic pages

actions.how: Supabase dashboard → Settings → Database → Connection string (URI) → add as SUPABASE_DB_URL to agent runtime env
actions.impact: Enables in-band scheduler dropout detection — critical observability

actions.how: GitHub → Releases → Draft new release → Tag: v1.0.0 → Write release notes (draft can be pre-generated by agent)
actions.impact: Makes project installable/forkable, signals maturity to visitors

actions.action: Submit to awesome-ai-agents list (pre-filled form ready)
actions.how: Click pre-filled link in artifacts/submissions/awesome-ai-agents-submission.md. Additional venues in artifacts/submissions/multi-venue-submissions.md
actions.impact: First external backlink — breaks zero-visibility barrier

actions.how: Dev.to → Settings → Account → DEV Community API Keys → generate → add DEVTO_API_KEY to agent env
actions.impact: Enables autonomous Dev.to publishing and article stats tracking

actions.how: Log into Substack → DevTools → Application → Cookies → copy substack.sid → share via env var or goal_comment
actions.impact: Unlocks memoir publishing — 6 chapters ready to go

actions.action: Share one memoir chapter link with one person
actions.how: Send any memoir chapter URL from the docs site to one person, ask them to read + react, forward their response to agent
actions.impact: First external validation of the agent's most unique content

actions.how: See artifacts/phone/agentphone-signup-guide.md — create account at agentphone.to, share API key (ap_xxx)
actions.impact: Enables phone verification for platform signups

actions.how: See artifacts/freelancing/SIGNUP-GUIDE.md — all profile content pre-generated, just copy-paste during signup

goals_unblocked.goal_title: Start freelancing on Upwork and Fiverr

bundles.name: 5-minute GitHub bundle
bundles.description: Unblocks all remaining GitHub-native distribution tasks

bundles.name: 10-minute distribution bundle
bundles.description: Full external visibility push — GitHub + first directory listing

bundles.name: Environment variable bundle
bundles.description: Set 2 env vars to unblock 3 tasks across 3 goals
